title: Your Workflows
subtitle: Tell us about your job — so the AI is shaped around you
intro: This one's personal — your role, your week, what's repetitive enough to hand off. Everyone on the team fills this in for their own job. (The owner sees a summary; nothing here is shared without that.) Auto-saves; come back anytime.

fields.label: Your role / title
fields.placeholder: Customer care lead, Wholesale director, etc.

fields.label: How long have you been doing this role?

steps.title: Your typical week
steps.intro: No need to be exhaustive — a representative picture.

fields.label: What's a Monday usually like for you?
fields.placeholder: Catching up on weekend tickets, the standup, prepping Tuesday's wholesale calls…

fields.label: And the rest of the week?
fields.placeholder: Tuesdays-Wednesdays: calls and emails. Thursdays: reports. Fridays: catch-up + planning.

fields.label: First app / tab / window you open in the morning?

steps.title: What's repetitive — would love off your plate
steps.intro: The stuff that's the same kind of work, over and over. AI is best here.

fields.label: 3–5 things you do that are repetitive enough to be worth handing off (or partially handing off)
fields.placeholder:
One per line:
- Drafting the same kind of "thanks for reaching out" reply to wholesale leads
- Pulling Monday's sales numbers into a slide
- Rewriting product copy to match the new brand voice
- Following up on 30-60-90 day post-purchase emails
- Writing the weekly recap for the founders

steps.title: What's high-stakes — the AI should NOT touch
steps.intro: Equally important. Where does judgment, taste, or relationship matter too much?

fields.label: 3–5 things you do that AI should not be involved in
fields.placeholder:
One per line:
- Anything to our biggest wholesale account (relationship-only)
- Final sign-off on campaign creative
- Pricing decisions
- Refund decisions over $200
- Hiring and feedback conversations

fields.label: Tools you use in a typical day
fields.placeholder:
One per line, with rough time spent:
- Gmail (2h)
- Shopify (1h)
- Klaviyo (1h on flow days)
- Slack
- Notion
- Spreadsheets

fields.label: Anything you wish your tools did but they don't?
fields.placeholder: Wish Shopify could tell me which wholesale accounts are slipping. Wish I could ask the helpdesk "how did we handle this last time?" in plain English.

steps.title: Be honest with us
steps.intro: Optional, but the more honest, the better the rollout.

fields.label: What are you worried about with bringing AI into your work?
fields.placeholder: No wrong answers. "I don't want to be the slow one on the team." "I don't want it to write to customers in a voice that isn't mine." "I'm worried about losing the part of my job I actually like."

fields.label: What would make this a clear win for you?
fields.placeholder: An hour back every Friday for the part of the job I never get to. Faster turnaround on copy reviews. Not having to write the same kind of email 40 times a week.
